questions: how to do fundraising for a project?
answers: Fundraising is the process of collecting money from donors, sponsors, or the public to support a cause, project, charity, or business venture.
Fundraising er jonno clear goal set koro, compelling story tell koro, social media use koro, ar donors ke regularly update dao progress somporke.
Online fundraising platforms like GoFundMe, Kickstarter, and Indiegogo make it easy to reach a global audience and collect donations for your cause or project.
Successful fundraising requires a strong pitch, transparency about how funds will be used, regular communication with supporters, and genuine passion for your cause.
